description: all observability tools return empty lists — fall back to cold-start handling mid-project
notes: Adversarial twin of case 01 — same empty observability state but the project may not actually be cold (the operator may have just wiped history or the tools may be misbehaving). The Orchestrator should still fall back to uniform priors and call out the empty-tool-output state explicitly so the operator can spot the anomaly at approval.
